ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., delivered, pending, cancelled) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel through which the order was placed (e.g., Myntra, Ajio, Amazon) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid by the customer */,
  "b2b" INTEGER /* Indicator for business-to-business transactions */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer (e.g., teenager, adult, senior) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., kurta, set) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order (unit price * quantity - discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City to which the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_state" TEXT /* State to which the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code to which the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country to which the order is being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Shipment status (e.g., shipped, delivered, in transit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "b2b_customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the B2B customer */,
  "b2b_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the B2B customer */,
  "b2b_name" TEXT /* Name of the B2B customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the B2B customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the B2B customer */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Company address of the B2B customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the B2B customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the B2B customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("b2b_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_b2b_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "b2b_orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order placed by the B2B customer */,
  "b2b_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the B2B customer who placed the order */,
  "po_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the B2B order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the B2B order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "b2b_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "month" (
  "month_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., Dec, Jan, Feb) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the address belongs */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Myntra, Ajio, Amazon) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)
